mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_disaster_facility WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '불량' THEN 0 WHEN '점검필요' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, next_check ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_disaster_facility WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disaster_facility WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disaster_facility WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disaster_facility WHERE deleted = 0 AND fac_type = #{facType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_disaster_facility (mgmt_no, name, fac_type, location, capacity, material, chemical, install_date, check_cycle, last_check, next_check, status, mgr_name, law_basis, interlock, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{mgmtNo}, #{name}, #{facType}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{material}, #{chemical}, #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{checkCycle}, #{lastCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'정상', #{mgrName}, #{lawBasis}, #{interlock}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_disaster_facility SET mgmt_no = #{mgmtNo}, name = #{name}, fac_type = #{facType}, location = #{location}, capacity = #{capacity}, material = #{material}, chemical = #{chemical}, install_date = #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, check_cycle = #{checkCycle}, last_check = #{lastCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, next_check = #{nextCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, mgr_name = #{mgrName}, law_basis = #{lawBasis}, interlock = #{interlock}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_disaster_facility SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
